title: Trichophyllum bicolor
taxonomy: Trichophyllum bicolor is a species of moss in the family Bryaceae. It is classified within the phylum Bryophyta, which consists of non-vascular plants. The family Bryaceae is a group of mosses characterized by the presence of perichaetia and a usually two- or three-toothed calyptra. This species is further classified within the genus Trichophyllum, which is a genus of mosses commonly found in wet environments. The classification of Trichophyllum bicolor is a part of the larger system of plant taxonomy.
